arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany offers surprising injury update for Bayern Munich
arts.sum: When Bayern Munich midfielder Aleksandar Pavlović broke his collarbone earlier this season, it was assumed by many that the youngster would be sidelined for the rest of the Hinrunde. The Heidenheim match is next Saturday, December 7th, which seems...really quick (and maybe a little unnecessary).

arts.ttl: Match Preview: Borussia Dortmund Prepare to Face Unbeaten Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund are currently in fifth place in the Bundesliga table, ten points off the top, after a disappointing start to the season under new manager Nuri Şahin. Bayern Munich are the same formidable beast as ever, having so far dropped just four points in the Bundesliga this season.

arts.ttl: Bundesliga Power Rankings: November Edition — Bayern Munich stays on top, four new teams move into the top half
arts.sum: Bayern has been one of Europe’s hottest teams over the past month, winning five consecutive Bundesliga matches with 16 goals and five clean sheets. Wins over Heidenheim, Werder Bremen, and St. Pauli won’t impress the average fan, but Gladbach’s gritty performances against RB Leipzig and Frankfurt tell a different story.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich's Thomas Müller on Der Klassiker: "Borussia Dortmund my biggest German rival"
arts.sum: Thomas Müller is no stranger to Der Klassiker, the Bayern Munich legend even describing Borussia Dortmund as his "biggest rival" in German football. Lars Ricken (sporting director): "It's the biggest game of the Bundesliga season so far, between the two biggest teams in the league.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs. Bayern Munich: Lineups, team news, injuries, and more!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich continue to march on as they continue to their rich vein of form as they travel to North-Rhine Westphalia to take on Borussia Dortmund in this season’s first edition of Der Klassiker . Expected lineups for tomorrow [ @tzmuenchen ] pic.twitter.com/wWxZcrtbbb

arts.ttl: Match Ratings: BVB Victorious Over Zagreb
arts.sum: Ray Bensebaini doubled the lead through a Pascal Groß corner kick, and finally Serhou Guirassy found space with a mature finish to secure three points. The opening goal came late in the first half, as Jamie Gittens dribbled around Zagreb’s defender, finishing an impressive shot that looked rather similar to many of his goals this season.

arts.ttl: Report: Choupo-Moting finds new work after leaving Bayern Munich...with Red Bull
arts.sum: Eric Maxim Choupo-Moting will join New York Red Bulls [in the MLS]. Who knew Eric-Maxim Choupo-Moting would stay at Bayern Munich for four years?

arts.ttl: Breaking: Report indicates Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies had late night run-in with police
arts.sum: With an estimated blood alcohol level of 0.6 g/l, Alphonso Davies was arrested while drunk driving a Lamborghini on the night of Thursday to Friday, German media outlet Bild reported. Note: This is a compilation of several posts based on a report by Bild involving a potential police matter involving Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich won’t discipline Alphonso Davies for police incident
arts.sum: According to a report from Sky Sport journalist Kerry Hau, Bayern Munich will not punish left-back Alphonso Davies ahead of the team’s showdown with Borussia Dortmund in Der Klassiker on Saturday: As indicated by Hau, Davies was present at the final session and — as far as Bayern Munich is concerned — there is nothing to see here.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany eager to experience first Bayern Munich vs. Borussia Dortmund tussle
arts.sum: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany knows a thing or two about experiencing a big game atmosphere. It’s going to be a tough game,” said Kompany (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ).
